examples: The variety of garnet includes almandine, pyrope, magnesium-iron garnet, manganese-aluminum garnet, andradite and calcium-chromium garnet.
Combined red mud phase is mainly composed of quartz and calcium aluminum melilite, followed by albite, andradite garnet, and perovskite garnet.
The results show that garnets in the ore deposit are mainly andradite-grossularite and augites are mainly diopside. The skarns in the Jiama ore deposit belong to typical calcic skarns.
